{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304080443BD90898BF38E2242B1"}"},"total":1766},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601596936220001049","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"谁能想到，一部开篇略显平淡的，不那么超凡的超凡小说，后面的高潮部分竟然复刻了顶上战争的宏伟场面，作者菌加油！一定要继续燃下去啊！[怒][怒][怒]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769893243,"group_id":"7539113187103231000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"二十多年老书虫一只","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzQtNMvxjv6WXjcLcNhIqZ4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"975963106588606","user_name":"炸天帮-万年筑基弟子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"975963106588606","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539113187103231000","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】【游戏异界】【非传统数据流】【无重生】【无系统】【后宫】
如果玩家无法复活，那还算是什么第四天灾？
这个问题问的很好，可你有没有想过，究竟什么才是天灾？
靠着一次又一次代价低廉的复活，不厌其烦的骚扰Boss？
就像是巨象脚下的蝼蚁、阴沟里的老鼠、下水道里的蛆虫……却美其名曰，冠以所谓的天灾名号。
真正的天灾——是时代的洪流！是璀璨的星火！
是打破一切固有规则与秩序的铁锤！
是推翻腐朽时代的利刃！是缔造全新文明的辉光！
说的实在是太好了……可问题是，你也没有说这个不能复活是指玩家本身啊！
我要退游！
退游吗？可如果我告诉你，你能够在游戏世界中得到想要的一切呢？
原力、魔药、炼金、符文、占卜、职业者、超凡生命、神奇道具……所有超自然的力量，你都可以自游戏世界携带至现实。
权力、名声、财富、地位，唾手可得……
改变命运的机会不多，或许此生仅有一次。
无名小卒，还是名扬天下？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o027e2fd86718a5b4d908ab35cff24cfa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李庄白肉","author_id":"","book_id":"7539113187103231000","book_name":"网游：魔药术士的重启人生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#380800","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7539472513143685656","read_count":"176346","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1467066"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"710","tags":"游戏体育,网游,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/db90cce9b29b10f5cdf5ea1789ceb496~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394084&x-signature=vWfo2trKZDT1zEfFM7O87jhJUQU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96103268421","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"647"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304080443BD90898BF38E2242B1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":125,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":29,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":55538,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":77545},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7545051385276941080","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"新题材下料就是猛啊！感觉文笔再好点可以投起点了"},"conten
